## Meeting Purpose

[Knowledge transfer call between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss improvements in content generation workflows and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has implemented significant upgrades to their V2 content generation workflow, improving quality and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [New workflows include enhanced keyword research, search intent mapping, and more sophisticated outline generation](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Strapi team expressed interest in having more control over content fine-tuning and source selection](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Plans to increase content output frequency once quality concerns are addressed](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

## Topics

### V2 Workflow Improvements

  - [More skimmable content with better formatting (bullet points, numbered lists, H3s)](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Enhanced search intent analysis using top-ranking Google pages](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Improved outline generation with better section structuring](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Increased internal and external linking for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Manual human review at critical stages (title selection, outline approval, final editing)](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)

### SEO Optimization

  - [New workflow automatically optimizes meta keywords, descriptions, and titles](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Incorporates Strapi's SEO plugin requirements](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Utilizes perplexity API for citations and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Plans for an optional fact-checking workflow at the end of the content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

### Content Customization and Sources

  - [Working on ability to select different sources for keyword research (e.g., Google, Strapi dev docs)](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Regularly updating knowledge base with Strapi's sitemap for accurate internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Exploring options for manual assignment of specific resources for particular articles](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)

### Quality Control and AI Detection

  - [Efforts to "humanize" content by removing obvious AI-generated phrases](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
  - [Focus on balanced presentation of topics (e.g., equal treatment of decoupled vs. headless CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Extensive human review process to ensure quality and natural language](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)

### Future Plans

  - [Developing fact-checking and custom source selection workflows](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Shifting strategy towards more top-of-funnel content and integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)
  - [Aim to increase content output and publishing frequency once quality concerns are addressed](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule bi-weekly knowledge transfer sessions instead of weekly](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=2397.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue refining workflows based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Strapi team to review new content and provide feedback on improvements](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Plan for increased content output once quality benchmarks are consistently met](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [GrowthX to update Alice about the change in meeting frequency](https://fathom.video/share/AgyseUS1s9e8xswyyqqYW6yYANEqxcmg?tab=summary&timestamp=2425.0)
